name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, poor inventory visibility causes stockouts. We provide automated restock notifications instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inability to monitor inventory levels effectively, leading to stockouts.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to monitor inventory levels effectively, leading to stockouts.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, poor inventory visibility causes stockouts. We provide automated restock notifications instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of inventory levels using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, poor inventory visibility causes stockouts. We provide automated restock notifications instead of manual tracking.
